scripts.docker:up: bun scripts/ensure-envs.ts && bun scripts/compose.ts up -d postgres postgres-test rabbitmq rabbitmq-test logto kong games wallets prometheus grafana && bun scripts/seed-logto.ts && bun scripts/compose.ts up -d --build frontend
scripts.docker:up:infra: bun scripts/ensure-envs.ts && bun scripts/compose.ts up -d postgres postgres-test rabbitmq rabbitmq-test logto kong games wallets prometheus grafana && bun scripts/seed-logto.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd services/games typecheck && bun run --cwd services/wallets typecheck
scripts.test:unit: bun run --cwd services/games test && bun run --cwd services/wallets test
